{{Infobox technique
| name = Rippling Sword
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Rippling Sword Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Rippling [[Sword]] is a versatile [[Striker technique]] used by various combatants to project energy from their weapons. When unleashed, it typically manifests as a crescent-shaped wave or storm of [[sword aura]] and [[madra]] that travels through the air. The visual appearance of the technique varies depending on the user; it can appear as a silver light, a surge of red and silver energy, or even a wave of orange flame. In combat, the technique is used for both offensive and defensive purposes. It can be powerful enough to slice through physical objects, tear through opposing techniques, or even sever the heads of massive creatures. Some users can launch multiple [[Rippling Swords]] simultaneously from different directions or through specialized constructs like [[sword]]-arms. However, the effectiveness of the technique can be influenced by the user's current strength and the quality of their [[madra]]. It is also susceptible to being countered or destroyed by more powerful energy attacks.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] and her [[Blood Shadow]] use the [[Rippling Sword technique]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Rippling Sword]] is a technique used by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Rippling Sword]] is a technique that releases a wave of deadly [[sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Rippling Sword]] is a technique used against the woman.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] slashes with a [[Rippling Sword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Rippling Sword]] is a technique used by [[Ruby]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]]'s [[Rippling Sword]] is dense enough to cut through the Hydra’s [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rippling Sword]] is a silver-and-red wave of [[madra]] used by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Rippling Sword]] is a [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] used the [[Rippling Sword]] against a phantom [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
